_instructions: Fix wrong or missing scores from the free data feed. Only use when the feed is clearly wrong.
Each entry finds a game by 'date' + the two team names (either order) and forces the score.
ft = final score [team1, team2]. Add 'aet': true if it was decided in extra time.
For a penalty shootout, also add 'p': [team1pens, team2pens] so the winner is worked out.
Remove an entry once the feed itself is correct again. Leave overrides: [] when nothing needs fixing.
Team names must match the tracker exactly (see _valid_team_names in owners.json).
